generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunded our military has become. Last year, my grandson's unit had to delay critical training exercises because of budget cuts. Meanwhile, our adversaries are modernizing at record pace. We can't afford to wait any longer. A modest increase in defense spending isn't just about more weapons - it's about ensuring our troops have the resources they need to stay safe and effective. Our allies are already stepping up - it's time for us to do our part. #NationalSecurityFirst
